title: rhamnus × schurii
intro: Rhamnus × schurii, a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus palarum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe. Rhamnus × schurii is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anthraquinone glycosides, tannins, and flavonoids, that contribute to its health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including diarrhea, constipation, and skin conditions, due to its ability to regulate bowel movements and reduce inflammation. Rhamnus × schurii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
